mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hot_stamping_type_compatibility ( product_name, hot_stamping_type_id, compatibility_status, paper_type, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{productName}, #{hotStampingTypeId}, #{compatibilityStatus}, #{paperType}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE hot_stamping_type_compatibility SET product_name = #{productName}, hot_stamping_type_id = #{hotStampingTypeId}, compatibility_status = #{compatibilityStatus}, paper_type = #{paperType}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT name FROM products WHERE name IS NOT NULL AND name != '' ORDER BY name
SELECT DISTINCT hot_stamping_paper_type FROM products WHERE hot_stamping_paper_type IS NOT NULL AND hot_stamping_paper_type != '' ORDER BY hot_stamping_paper_type
SELECT DISTINCT hot_stamping_paper_type FROM products WHERE name = #{productName} AND hot_stamping_paper_type IS NOT NULL AND hot_stamping_paper_type != '' ORDER BY hot_stamping_paper_type

SELECT hstc.id, hstc.product_name as productName, hstc.hot_stamping_type_id as hotStampingTypeId, hstc.compatibility_status as compatibilityStatus, hstc.paper_type as paperType, hstc.created_at as createdAt, hstc.updated_at as updatedAt, CASE WHEN hto.position_type IS NULL THEN hto.stamping_type ELSE hto.stamping_type || '-' || hto.position_type END as hotStampingTypeName FROM hot_stamping_type_compatibility hstc LEFT JOIN hot_stamping_type_options hto ON hstc.hot_stamping_type_id = hto.id ORDER BY hto.stamping_type, hto.position_type, hstc.product_name

SELECT DISTINCT unnest(notice_ids) FROM hot_stamping_type_compatibility WHERE notice_ids IS NOT NULL AND array_length(notice_ids, 1) > 0 AND compatibility_status IN ('V', '▷')
AND hot_stamping_type_id = #{hotStampingTypeOptionId}
